title: Cloud Run Revisions, Validation, Traffic, Rollback, and Recovery · Stakeholder Delivery Mission
summary: A regional emergency-status service. The service needs environment approval, GitHub OIDC, constrained Google identity, digest deployment with no traffic, smoke checks, a canary, abort signals, rollback, and IAM separation. Planned artifact: Deliver Federated Cloud Run Progressive Release with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Request id-token write only in the deployment job and validate issuer, audience, subject, workflow ref, repository identity, event, and environment claims.
Exchange GitHub OIDC identity through a constrained Google Workload Identity Provider and service account without storing a key.
Move bounded traffic by revision or tag, define observation window, compare user and system signals, and stop on explicit abort conditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact · Project Ci Cloud Run Rollback Rollforward
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-cloud-run-rollback-rollforward-17xkab". Tailor its cloud-run-delivery.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Cloud Run Rollback Rollforward into observable performance evidence. content.code:
# Evidence: ci-cloud-run-rollback-rollforward-17xkab
  - competency: ci-cloud-run-rollback-rollforward
    artifact: cloud-run-delivery.yaml
    decision: cloud run rollback rollforward
    environment: sandbox Google Cloud project with a private Cloud Run service
    fault-injection: make the service container start before it is ready
    retained-proof: accessible redacted timeline with owner expiry and regression control
    case-key: 17xkab
    change: |
      deploy-cloudrun-action: 3
      service: status-api
      region: us-central1
      image: registry.example.test/status@sha256:verified
      revision-suffix: run8842
      traffic: none-at-deploy
      smoke: authenticated-changed-case
      canary-percent: 5
      observe: latency-errors-user-success
      abort: explicit-threshold
      rollback: prior-revision-traffic
      iam: separately-owned
    verify: inspect revision image identity readiness authenticated smoke traffic totals observation window abort decision rollback and IAM audit
    failure: Reject latest tags, deploy acceptance as readiness, instant full traffic, representative-canary assumptions, rebuild rollback, or deployment-owned public IAM.
    repair: Deploy verified digest without traffic, smoke exact revision, canary with signals, abort predictably, move traffic back, and separate IAM.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
